title: Chorus Of Eden Spirits
content:
В В В В Hearken, oh hearken! let your souls behind you
В В В В Turn, gently moved!
В В В В Our voices feel along the Dread to find you,
В В В В O lost, beloved!
В В В В Through the thick-shielded and strong-marshalled angels,
В В В В They press and pierce:
В В В В Our requiems follow fast on our evangels,
В В В В Voice throbs in verse.
В В В В We are but orphaned spirits left in Eden
В В В В A time ago:
В В В В God gave us golden cups, and we were bidden
В В В В To feed you so.
В В В В But now our right hand hath no cup remaining,
В В В В No work to do,
В В В В The mystic hydromel is spilt, and staining
В В В В The whole earth through.
В В В В Most ineradicable stains, for showing
В В В В (Not interfused!)
В В В В That brighter colours were the worldпїЅs foregoing,
В В В В Than shall be used.
В В В В Hearken, oh hearken! ye shall hearken surely
В В В В For years and years,
В В В В The noise beside you, dripping coldly, purely,
В В В В Of spiritsпїЅ tears.
В В В В The yearning to a beautiful denied you,
В В В В Shall strain your powers.
В В В В Ideal sweetnesses shall over-glide you,
В В В В Resumed from ours.
В В В В In all your music, our pathetic minor
В В В В Your ears shall cross;
В В В В And all good gifts shall mind you of diviner,
В В В В With sense of loss.
В В В В We shall be near you in your poet-languors
В В В В And wild extremes,
В В В В What time ye vex the desert with vain angers,
В В В В Or mock with dreams.
В В В В And when upon you, weary after roaming,
В В В В DeathпїЅs seal is put,
В В В В By the foregone ye shall discern the coming,
В В В В Through eyelids shut.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Elizabeth Barrett Browning represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.

In the broader context of Elizabeth Barrett Browning's bibliography, these specific lines stand out for their clarity and poignancy. Whether you are searching for inspiration or a moment of quiet contemplation, this work offers a timeless perspective that transcends its original era.

At Linespedia, we have curated this specific poem to ensure it reaches a modern audience. We recommend sharing these lines as a digital poster or using them as a thoughtful caption to connect with others who appreciate the enduring beauty of verse.
